testcase.name: test_member_cannot_patch_when_not_assignee
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_issues_and_cert.py:132: in test_member_cannot_patch_when_not_assignee assert r.status_code == 403, f"expected 403 for non-assignee, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 403 for non-assignee, got 404: {"detail":"Issue not found"} E assert 404 == 403 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_comment_by_member
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_issues_and_cert.py:152: in test_comment_by_member assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Issue not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_intern_certificate_pdf

failure.message:
AssertionError: Missing 'DIGITALLY ISSUED CERTIFICATE' assert None + where None = <function search at 0xfb5a08b7d440>('DIGITALLY\s*ISSUED\s*CERTIFICATE', '%PDF-1.4

>>

>>

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_issues_and_cert.py:194: in test_intern_certificate_pdf assert re.search(r"DIGITALLY\s*ISSUED\s*CERTIFICATE", text, re.I), "Missing 'DIGITALLY ISSUED CERTIFICATE'" E AssertionError: Missing 'DIGITALLY ISSUED CERTIFICATE' E assert None E + where None = <function search at 0xfb5a08b7d440>('DIGITALLY\s*ISSUED\s*CERTIFICATE', '%PDF-1.4
